g.text: │ The legacy 3-file bundle format (tar.gz.enc + PASSWORD + README) │
│ is deprecated and will be removed in a future release. │
Use the new single-file ZIP format instead:
│ Or stream via SSH (zero disk footprint): │
ssh user@server "sudo kopi-docka disaster-recovery export --stream" > recovery.zip
│ Benefits: Single file, AES-256 ZIP, no tar/openssl needed, │
│ This will create an encrypted bundle containing everything │
│ needed to reconnect to your Kopia repository on a new system. │
INFO Added rclone.conf to recovery bundle from /root/.config/rclone/rclone.conf
WARNING Recovery password written to sidecar file. Store it in a secure place
and consider moving it away from the archive.
│ • Store the password in a secure location │
│ • Keep bundle separate from production system │
